channel.title: LIBRCHAIN 区块链新闻雷达
channel.description: 每小时自动更新的区块链新闻、博客与 X 热点聚合

item.title: Allbridge pauses cross-chain bridge after $1.65M exploit
item.description: The attacker allegedly used a flash loan and rapid swaps to manipulate the bridge’s stablecoin exchange rate.

item.title: Interesting point. The first one feels temporary. The second one more durable. But hash power or energy going to Bitcoin mining doesn't determine its price (the network difficulty adjusts if miners go offline to keep the same pace of block mining). Long term, Bitc - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZ0FVX3lxTFBjeEtKbFBsTXFmTm9SWDBzcmNvXzdfZVpCQUxmX1M2UFV1dFZuYnZNcFpQZV9sbDdtM1loRW9LVXppYjI0c1FsS1dTQ2JKenBYSElvcWE2QWtMVVRVQl81RGVwa0k5SGs?oc=5" target="_blank">Interesting point. The firs…

item.title: Japanese logistics company eyes JPYC stablecoin to pay drivers
item.description: The planned rollout would let thousands of transportation contractors receive digital yen payments more frequently and quickly.

item.title: South Korea probed 40 cases of crypto manipulation over 2 years
item.description: Financial Services Commission Chair Lee Eog-won posted the figures on the second anniversary of the enactment of the Virtual Asset User Protection Act.

item.title: Will the US get CLARITY this week? Bitcoin’s new $80K target: Hodler’s Digest, July 19
item.description: The fate of the CLARITY Act hinges on Trump’s ethics, so the odds aren’t looking great. Prediction market volumes hit new highs, and more news.

item.title: The GENIUS Act turns 1: State of Crypto
item.description: The stablecoin-focused GENIUS Act became a law a year ago.

item.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
item.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.

item.title: Saylor turns up heat with ‘110 reasons’ why BIP-110 is a bad idea
item.description: The man in control of the biggest Bitcoin corporate treasury said he shares the objectives but disagrees about the remedy detailed in the proposed temporary fork.

item.title: There are two problems rn for crypto and, specifically, bitcoin bulls: 1) marginal liquidity would rather speculate in prediction markets and equity markets 2) marginal energy to mine BTC is worth 10-20x if reallocated to serving AI tokens These changes feel stru - x.com

item.title: It’s 2026 Bitcoin is more than halfway through its second year in the current #BTC Four Year Cycle 2025 proved to be the year of the $BTC Bull Market peak And 2026 has proven itself to be the year of the Bitcoin Bear Market 2027 will be the Bottoming Out yea - x.com

item.title: Bitcoin's biggest advocate, Michael Saylor, says new plan to clean up the blockchain is 'a bad idea'
item.description: Michael Saylor argues that a new proposal, BIP-110, to temporarily block "spam" data from the Bitcoin blockchain would undermine the network's neutrality and create a dangerous precedent for censorship.

item.title: JUST IN: Michael Saylor hints at another Bitcoin announcement tomorrow 👀 What's next? - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZ0FVX3lxTE1CaWVheWE0SEN6RVhvcjBKZWZUU3dkaEtHa1hxVHNZZThCUHctVVF3TVpIQUtTS1R4SWFlR3FIc3c1UERhbzloVTgxN3ZoY3NLRnNHZVJTY3drMXprRXBrODU0TlFqZlk?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: Michael Saylor hin…

item.title: AI is destroying the internet. Math is our only hope.
item.description: The rise of autonomous AI agents necessitates the utilization of zero-knowledge proofs, argues Brian Trunzo, chief growth officer at Succinct Labs.

item.title: Tether's USDT hits 2-year countdown threatening its position on U.S. crypto platforms
item.description: The GENIUS Act has hit its first anniversary without U.S. regulators yet meeting deadlines to write regulations, though rules will be in full effect by July 2028.

item.title: Kraken says simpler options can unlock crypto's next derivatives market
item.description: The Wyoming-based firm launched USD-settled bitcoin and ether options, saying product design, not demand, has held back adoption.

item.title: US agencies miss GENIUS Act deadline for final stablecoin rules
item.description: US regulators failed to finalize implementing regulations by the GENIUS Act’s one-year deadline, issuing 10 proposed rules instead.

item.title: JUST IN: Michael Saylor hints at buying more Bitcoin. "What's next?" - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTFBJTGMwNXcxZ2FRMU43aDlfVWxISjhkOWR0UDFwX2F2OXJNRTNCUVo0amplQmJhU1FPV0w5dEtJSWpXb3hHQndlQ2gzUDdOYXd2UFhfZUxraFp0cXNfd2pPZ05n?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: Michael Saylor hints at b…

item.title: Upbit parent Dunamu faces South Korean regulator sanctions process: Report
item.description: Korea’s Virtual Asset User Protection Act lacks explicit sanctions provisions for hacking and similar incidents, clouding the scope of penalties facing the Upbit operator Dunamu.

item.title: Bitcoin’s quantum problem gets a recovery tool, but not for Satoshi’s 1.1 million coins
item.description: Project Eleven says it has funded a proof that lets a wallet's own key-derivation path stand in as ownership after quantum computers can forge its signatures. It runs in 243 milliseconds on a laptop.

item.title: wataa - x.com
item.description: wataa

item.title: Many Bitcoiners I respect support BIP 110. I understand and share their desire to protect Bitcoin, but believe the proposed cure is more dangerous than the condition. Here are 110 reasons why Bitcoin needs guardians of neutrality. - x.com

item.title: Crypto has a way of humbling exactly the people who think they've figured it out. Usually right after a good run is when the real test shows up. Bears stay bearish too long and forget to buy, bulls remain bullish while it is time to exit. Experience will eventually lea - x.com

item.title: 🇰🇷 SOUTH KOREA IS GOING ALL IN ON CRYPTO The government unveiled a sweeping digital asset strategy covering stablecoins, tokenized bonds, and spot ETFs in a single policy package. Seoul is drafting a Basic Law on Digital Assets to legalize stablec - x.com

item.title: Inside Zcash's new node that targets Visa-scale privacy at 50,000 transactions per second
item.description: The new Zakura client is the first live piece of a plan to take Zcash from roughly one private transaction per second to payment-network scale.

item.title: Jeff Yan: Crypto's biggest problem is the lack of top entrepreneurial talent On July 9, 2026, Hyperliquid co-founder Jeff Yan @chameleon_jeff stated in an interview on the VALR podcast that a fair criticism of the current crypto and fintech sectors is their inability - x.com

item.title: A large group of investors are waiting for #Bitcoin to drop to $40,000 and to bottom in October. What if that doesn't happen? What's plan B? Most of those people will then be buying back at $90,000 per #Bitcoin. That, to me, is a stupid strategy to go for. I think th - x.com

item.title: France orders country's internet service providers to block Polymarket
item.description: The regulator cited concerns over addictive mechanics, a lack of self-exclusion tools, and a high volume of French users bypassing previous financial restrictions.

item.title: Owning crypto should not disqualify you from owning a home. The American Dream is homeownership. Washington keeps making it harder to get there. Hardworking Americans who have built real wealth through cryptocurrency cannot use those assets to qua - x.com

item.title: Crypto executives say digital native generations may never need a bank account
item.description: Steakhouse Financial co-founder Adrian Cachinero says digital-native generations may rely less on banks, while Binance says younger users are already driving crypto adoption in emerging markets.

item.title: JUST IN: Alleged crypto scammer busted after FBI traced his Uber Eats orders. - x.com

item.title: DOG Mode explains Bitcoin's next governance fight
item.description: Leonidas' DOG Mode client challenges Bitcoin's default relay policies, reopening a philosophical debate over censorship, free markets and who really governs the network.

item.title: Trump targets Brazil's payments system while dollar stablecoins are quietly overtaking country's payments
item.description: Washington views Brazil’s promotion of non-dollar payment channels, including Pix and the growth of stablecoins, as a potential threat to dollar-based trade, even as dollar-linked stablecoins account for about 90% of Brazil's crypto transa…

item.title: Here is why a massive $1.6 billion in crypto liquidity is sitting idle and wasting away
item.description: About $542 million weekly sat outside active trading ranges, meaning this capital earned zero fees and provided no market depth.

item.title: 🇺🇸 FBI arrests hacker for hiding crypto-stealing malware inside Steam video games. Once installed, the malware stole passwords, data and drained victims' crypto wallets. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTFBwYkJyTmRPTXRoZVpHVXVaWWxXQ01CNFptOVFRMjAyYUVjbmxuTXdHdnZVdm1YdkpnYmY5ZVNxSzJkWllvUDFibzlUV1U4YklSblJSZGJ0ckh5VmkxQ19BSUtR?oc=5" target="_blank">🇺🇸 FBI arrests hacker for hiding…

item.title: GPT-5.6 vs Fable 5 Review: Which One You Pick Depends on These Factors
item.description: OpenAI's GPT-5.6 Sol or Anthropic's Claude Fable 5: Which one is right for you? The answer depends on your needs. Here's our review.

item.title: Massive bitcoin call spreads target $72,000 by month end, right when the Fed meets
item.description: Large traders are betting on a BTC price rise to $72,000 by the end of the month, latest options market flow suggests.

item.title: Tokenization has become a strategic priority for 84% of financial firms
item.description: A Broadridge survey found Wall Street is accelerating tokenization efforts while betting on hybrid markets where digital and traditional assets coexist.

item.title: NEW: Bitcoin ETFs are likely to mirror Gold's 22-year ETF history, according to Bloomberg Intelligence 👀 We are so early still ✊ - x.com

item.title: Cobie: Coinbase Has Long Been Distant From Crypto-Native Users KOL Rune asked Coinbase trading product lead Cobie how the Base App plans to attract onchain users after trust in the Base ecosystem was damaged. Cobie replied that he took over the Ba - x.com

item.title: Kaspersky identifies malware framework targeting crypto investors
item.description: Cybersecurity company Kaspersky said a newly identified malware framework is targeting cryptocurrency investors through social engineering tactics and trojanized GitHub apps.

item.title: French gambling regulator orders ISPs to block Polymarket
item.description: Autorité nationale des jeux has ordered France’s internet service providers to geoblock Polymarket, citing illegal gambling and market manipulation concerns.

item.title: FTX to distribute $900M to creditors in fifth payment round
item.description: The FTX Recovery Trust and company have distributed about $10 billion since the exchange filed for bankruptcy in November 2022, leaving users cut off from their funds.

item.title: ECB Warns Stablecoins May Drain Bank Deposits—Here's What That Means
item.description: ECB board member Piero Cipollone laid out the three-layer threat banks face from digital payments, and pitched the digital euro as the only structural answer.

item.title: Galaxy lands 15-year Texas Tech stadium naming rights deal
item.description: Galaxy Digital will rename Texas Tech’s football stadium under a 15-year agreement, expanding its West Texas presence as the state attracts growing crypto investment.

item.title: Consensys unknowingly outsourced developer work to North Korean
item.description: Through an introduction with a “reputable third-party service provider,“ the company took on a developer who, as part of an investigation, was revealed to be tied to North Korea.

item.title: Crypto Biz: When dollars disappear, stablecoins step in
item.description: Bolivia moves to recognize USDT amid a dollar shortage, while Bitcoin miners’ AI ambitions face fresh investor scrutiny.

item.title: Cardano Pumps as Network Moves to Further Decentralize Development
item.description: Input Output is handing its core infrastructure to outside teams as ADA gets a lift from an imminent protocol upgrade.

item.title: Polymarket traders cut Clarity Act passage odds to record low as Senate delay drags on
item.description: Polymarket bettors have cut the odds of the CLARITY Act passing this year to a record low as Senate negotiations over ethics provisions remain unresolved.

item.title: Kimi K3 Just Triggered DeepSeek Flashbacks for the Stock Market
item.description: Moonshot AI's 2.8-trillion-parameter open-weight model sent chip stocks tumbling and gave Wall Street a Friday it would rather forget.

item.title: China’s Kimi K3 Is Out—And Beats Claude Fable and GPT 5.6 Sol on Key Benchmarks
item.description: Moonshot AI's 2.8-trillion-parameter model tops Fable 5 on a creative writing benchmark and leads Arena AI's frontend code leaderboard—at Claude Sonnet pricing.

item.title: Stripe and Swift race to control the next generation of global payments infrastructure
item.description: Crypto and blockchain experts say this week's moves show the two established finance companies are increasingly competing for control of the infrastructure behind digital payments.

item.title: Galaxy Puts Its Name on Texas Tech's Stadium in a 15-Year, Crypto-Native Deal
item.description: The Nasdaq-listed digital-asset firm will rebrand the Red Raiders' home as "Galaxy Stadium." The bigger bet is on the cheap power and open land of West Texas.

item.title: OKX Europe lets users convert USDT to MiCA-compliant USDC
item.description: The feature offers European customers a voluntary path away from Tether’s USDT as MiCA rules reshape the region’s stablecoin market.

item.title: Senator Warren requests 2026 reporting for Trump’s crypto earnings after $1.4B disclosure
item.description: With the Senate likely voting on a crypto bill within days, Elizabeth Warren asked for information on Donald Trump’s earnings between January and July ahead of a 2027 deadline.

item.title: Cardano hands core development to outside teams in decentralization push
item.description: Input Output will transfer control of the Haskell node, Plutus, Hydra and other components as founder Charles Hoskinson says the network must change and start growing again.

item.title: Inside Robinhood’s high-stakes bet to onboard millions of casual users onto decentralized finance
item.description: The company says its advantage lies in bringing retail customers onchain, but early activity remains dominated by memecoins, while its original tokenization vision remains small.

item.title: Bitcoin price sags under $62.5K as Iran strikes add to US stocks pressure
item.description: Bitcoin saw a key rejection at local highs before reversing lower, moving with stocks for a second day as US-Iran war downside took its toll.

item.title: BREAKING: 🇺🇸 Bitcoin Strategic Reserve discussion is officially planned for today's Clarity Act field hearing 🚀 - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZ0FVX3lxTFBPb3FNbENhOWQtbEllVjRKeE9PSnNWdTZoYXdLQ3gzZU01aEt1X2RqVGxYckxCc0dUMk85cjZhR2VhS0hueDlxeDNvWHRBTnZEQ29Ta2FnekdpOEZZZHlKSElOSDBhenc?oc=5" target="_blank">BREAKING: 🇺🇸 Bitcoin Stra…
